data.title: Stage-boundary preconditions manifest with depth-tiered schema and validator enforcement
data.description:
## Problem

Meta-pattern identified from 818 closed bugs: downstream stages trust upstream outputs without validating implicit assumptions (state, intent, context, gates). This surfaces as cascading failures across /dso:preplanning → /dso:implementation-plan → /dso:sprint → /dso:commit → epic-closure. Pattern validated on 5 closed epics: ≥3 preventable bugs per epic (75% catch rate on 40-bug sample).

## Solution

Stage-boundary preconditions manifests persisted as append-only PRECONDITIONS events in the existing ticket event directory. Depth-tiered schema (minimal/standard/deep) selected by dso:complexity-evaluator. Stage-boundary validators at 5 entry points consume the manifest to verify upstream claims before proceeding. Zero user-interaction from validators.

## Success Criteria

SC1. PRECONDITIONS events persist as flat <ts>-<uuid>-PRECONDITIONS.json in existing ticket directory (no subdirs; mirrors .suggestions hidden-dir exclusion precedent at suggestion-schema-contract.md:21). Brainstorm amend mode updates via append.

SC2. Depth-tiered schema driven by complexity classifier output:
  - minimal: {spec_hash, gate_verdicts, workflow_completion_checklist, completeness}
  - standard: adds {decisions_log, unresolved_questions, execution_context, committed_diff_hash, dispatch_profile}
  - deep: adds {test_contract, parser_input_classes, red_markers_active}

SC3. Field shapes:
  - gate_verdicts: composite-keyed (gate_name, session_id, worktree_id) with last-write-wins on conflict
  - workflow_completion_checklist: [{item, completed, evidence_ref, validator_verdict}]
  - evidence_ref: {source_type: user|codebase|inference|default, pointer, rationale}
  - affects_fields on every entry

SC4. Stage-boundary validators at entries of: /dso:preplanning, /dso:implementation-plan, /dso:sprint, /dso:commit, epic-closure verifier.

SC7. Validators cause zero user-interaction friction. source_type:user validates against already-captured ticket comments (not new prompts); source_type:inference structurally accepted (non-empty rationale).

SC8. Compaction on closure. p95 latency targets with committed benchmark. /dso:review adjacency documented for validator cost in review flow.

SC9. Coverage: dry-run harness demonstrates prevention of ≥100/818 bugs from historical corpus.

SC10. Depth-tier classifier contract: dso:complexity-evaluator emits manifest_depth ∈ {minimal, standard, deep}.

SC11. Validator self-verification: validators run against their own PRECONDITIONS events (eat own dogfood).

SC12. Downstream consumer migration: harvest-worktree.sh, dso:completion-verifier, merge-to-main.sh archive phase, ticket CLI list/show all updated to consume PRECONDITIONS events.

SC13. Practitioner outcome: workflow-restart rate drops ≥30% against pre-epic baseline.

SC14. False-positive guardrail: auto-fallback to minimal tier if FP rate exceeds 10% in production window.

## Validation Evidence

- 818-bug analysis across 5 parallel agents → 9 stable contract patterns
- 5-epic historical validation → 75% catch rate on 40-bug sample
- 2 rounds pressure testing (10 synthetic scenarios + 8 real epic walkthroughs) → 8 gaps surfaced and folded
- 3 parallel fidelity reviewers (2 cycles) → all dimensions PASS (≥4): Agent Clarity 4/4, Scope 4/4/4/4, Value 4/4
- Prior art survey: LangGraph #6491 (output-validation gap in production), LangGraph.js #536 (schema versioning RFC), Temporal update validators, metaswarm quality gates — no existing project unifies depth-tiering + evidence sourcing + event persistence + stage-boundary validators

## Sibling Epics (split from prior draft)

- a8e8-0b23: skill/agent/prompt authoring sub-agent
- e884-d0ad: PostToolUse hook for forced next-step reminders after sub-agent completion
- c183-ed2a: adversarial review of inference-sourced decisions + unresolved-questions forcing function

## Related

- 6068-cb2d: stale context meta-pattern (upstream-adjacent)

## Open Items for Implementation Plan

- Classifier → depth mapping spike (novel, no reference implementation)
- Validator cost measurement adjacent to /dso:review flow
- Benchmark harness for p95 latency targets
